title: Foreign key constraint fails when it should succeed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, username TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE comments (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, content TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL);
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, content) VALUES (1, 'This is a comment.');
INSERT INTO comments (user_id, content) VALUES (NULL, 'This comment has a NULL user_id.');
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE user_id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint validation on user comments
